positive: Stylized geometric woodland scene, featuring minimalist silhouettes of friendly forest animals (deer, rabbit, fox) interacting with stylized flora (ferns, abstract mushroom shapes) in a harmonious composition. The overall color palette is muted earth tones and deep teal, contrasted with pops of soft golden yellow. High contrast line art style with solid, flat color fills (screen print quality). Central focus, designed for apparel print. Studio lighting, symmetrical arrangement, graphic novel aesthetic. Clean edges, seamless design.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry edges, messy, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, noisy, dirty, realistic photography, deep shadows
